columns.Name: ORG_SECURITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: VIEW_ALL
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to display all organizations for the security profile.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Denotes the name for Security Profile.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This field represents whether an organization security profile is enabled or disabled. When it is enabled, it can be associated with a role.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_ORG_HIERARCHY
columns.Comments: This field enables or disables the Organization Hierarchy option for an organization security profile.

columns.Name: ORG_HIER_TREE_STRUCT_CODE
columns.Comments: This field represents if its referencing a department tree or generic organization tree.

columns.Name: ORG_HIER_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: This field represents the specific  tree code referencing the selected department tree or generic organization tree on the organization security profile.

columns.Name: TOP_ORG_SELECTION
columns.Comments: An organization security profile can be secured by organization trees. This represents an option which when enabled, can restrict the security up to that organization selected as a top organization in the tree.

columns.Name: TOP_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: This field represents an option which when enabled, includes the top organization in the selected tree.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_TOP_ORGANIZATION
columns.Comments: An organization security profile can be secured by organization trees. This represents an option which when enabled, can restrict security for selected top organization  in the tree. Otherwise security will be restricted only for those organizations below the top level organization.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not in use.

columns.Name: LOC_SECURITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not in use.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_ORG_CLASS
columns.Comments: This field enables or disables the Organization classification option for an organization security profile.

columns.Name: SECURE_BY_ORG_LIST
columns.Comments: This field enables or disables the Organization List option for an organization security profile.  When enabled, can allow security based on included or excluded organizations.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_FUTURE_ORGANIZATIONS
columns.Comments: INCLUDE_FUTURE_ORGANIZATIONS

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
